get.summary: Get paginated nodes for infinite scroll

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: sort_order cursor — fetch nodes after this value

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: sort_order cursor — fetch nodes before this value

parameters.name: source_nodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated source node UUIDs — fetch nodes whose source_node_id matches

parameters.name: node_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated node UUIDs — fetch nodes by their own ID

200.description: Node with content blocks and sentences
